text: The LORD Loves the Gates of Zion

segments.text: He has founded His cityon the holy mountains. [^190]
The LORD loves the gates of Zionmore than all the dwellings of Jacob.
Glorious things are ascribed to you, O city of God. Selah
I will mention Rahab[^191] and Babylonamong those who know Me—along with Philistia, Tyre, and Cush[^192]—when I say, ‘This one was born in Zion.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And it will be said of Zion:

This one and that one were born in her, 
and the Most High Himself will establish her.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The LORD will record in the register of the peoples:
This one was born in Zion.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: All my springs of joy are in You.
segments.speaker: Unknown
